name: npu-awake
title: Awake
description: Keep your PC awake without touching the mouse. Keyboard-first alternative to PowerToys Awake.
author: user

commands.name: awake-until
commands.title: Awake Until
commands.description: Keep awake until a specific time.

commands.name: awake-status
commands.title: Awake Status
commands.description: Show what is keeping the PC awake right now.

commands.name: stop-awake-daemon
commands.title: Stop Awake Daemon
commands.description: Stop the background Awake process (useful before rebuilding).

commands.name: screen-off-mode
commands.title: Screen-Off Mode
commands.description: System stays awake but display is allowed to sleep.

preferences.name: defaultAwakeMode
preferences.title: Default Awake Mode
preferences.description: Mode activated by the Awake toggle command.

preferences.name: defaultDuration
preferences.title: Default Duration (minutes)
preferences.description: Pre-filled value for the Awake For command when opened without an argument.

preferences.name: showLidNote
preferences.title: Lid Close Note
preferences.description: Show a note about lid-close / power-button behavior on success toasts.
preferences.label: Show lid close note on success
